name: modmailmanager
description: ModMailManager — sends Reddit modmail, new posts, and mod queue alerts to Discord. Includes optional Discord ticket management with Claim, Close, Reassign, and more.

scripts.bump-major: npm run build && devvit upload --bump major
scripts.bump-minor: npm run build && devvit upload --bump minor
scripts.bump-patch: npm run build && devvit upload --bump patch
scripts.bump-prerelease: npm run build && devvit upload --bump prerelease
